title: Implement optional null-conditional (?.) operand
body:
Implements the missing **null-conditional (`?.`)** operand in analysis/lowering so optional chaining matches the surface syntax.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`91fbe73`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/91fbe73)
- **Subject:** Implement missing ? operand
- **Completed:** 2026-03-07

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `compiler-foundation`

## Relation
Language-semantics task under **compiler-foundation** ahead of file-scoped module work.
